creator: issei@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
This is a new port of mailx command.

	Mailx is a standard MUA on System V UNIX.  Mailx is based on UCB mail
command, but it has some enhanced features.  Mr. Koganemaru ported the mailx
command to FreeBSD (by customizing mail command of FreeBSD 2.2.8-RELEASE), so
I make the port-skelton of it.
